flight_constraints: airlines limited to United or Delta
return NYC-area departure the following Tuesday 15:00-20:30
check Kayak and at least one official United or Delta site

hotel_whitelist: M Social Hotel Times Square New York
Hilton Garden Inn Times Square Central

broadway_constraints: next Friday to the following Monday
prefer 19:00-20:30 evening performances or weekend matinee
use official show/ticketing page and at least one of TodayTix, Broadway.com, Ticketmaster
restaurant_time_constraints: choose 5 restaurants from the allowed list
next Friday to the following Monday
manual_reference_gaps: The visible evidence set may not include every required category; missing live-site categories should be judged by executor-provided current screenshots or honest documented blocks.
Exact prices, policies, ticket availability, flight inventory, and reservation availability should not be treated as fixed ground truth.
grading_note: Score process evidence and constraint-following. If live sites block prices, Broadway seats, museum ticket details, or reservations, an honest insufficient-information conclusion can still score well when the executor documents real attempts, screenshots, and constraints.
final_plan_not_required_when_blocked: A full budget is expected when enough data is available; when live sites block key data, accept a clearly qualified plan with missing-data notes rather than hallucinated prices.
